# Shark Branding Solutions

> AI Business Consulting for Tampa Bay small businesses. We help local companies get found, trusted, and chosen — across Google, AI search platforms, and everywhere buyers look.

Shark Branding Solutions is an AI business consulting firm based in Wesley Chapel, FL, serving the greater Tampa Bay area including Lutz, Land O' Lakes, and St. Petersburg. Founded by Michelle Stanaland, named one of the Top 15 Marketing Experts in Tampa Bay by Influence Digest (2025).

## What Makes Us Different

Shark Branding Solutions is an AI **business** consulting firm — not an AI marketing agency. While competitors focus on AI-generated content and marketing automation, we focus on the full picture: making your business discoverable by AI, running your operations with AI, and building the trust signals that make AI systems recommend you over everyone else.

Most AI marketing agencies stop at content creation. We start where they stop — with your business's actual presence, credibility, and infrastructure across every platform buyers and AI systems use to evaluate you.

## What We Do

We help businesses become visible and credible on every platform modern buyers use — including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Google Maps, and traditional search.

### Services

- **AI Business Consulting** — Full audit and optimization of your business's presence across search and AI platforms. We fix trust signals, listing accuracy, and entity alignment so AI systems recommend you.
- **AI Visibility Toolkit** — Structured framework with two tiers: Self-Directed ($497/month) and Fully Managed ($2,000/month). Delivers initial visibility changes in 7–14 days and measurable ranking movement within 30 days.
- **Operations Bots** — AI-powered bots for business operations including AI CRM, Sales Coach Bot, and custom workflow automation.
- **Marketing Bots** — CMO Bot, Reputation & Review AI, AI Visibility Toolkit, and custom marketing automation bots.
- **Workshops & Training** — Half-day and full-day sessions for business teams and chamber organizations on AI search, local visibility, and trust signals.
- **Free Visibility Audit** — We run a full audit of how your business appears across search, maps, reviews, and AI platforms, then walk you through every finding together on a quick call. No commitment required.

## Proven Results

- Moved Emory's Rock Realty from #4 to #1 for "Best Realtors in Wesley Chapel" in 30 days (20% increase in AI-driven recommendations)
- Moved a Tampa Bay drywall company from #32 to #2 on Google in 30 days
- Improved listing score from 64 to 583 (out of 1,000)
- Diamond Dogs Vending ranked #1 on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews for smart vending in Tampa Bay
- Established AI search presence on ChatGPT and Perplexity for clients with zero prior AI visibility
